intro: Trigonostemon calcicola is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to tropical Asia. Traditionally, Trigonostemon calcicola has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its purported anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
